role_summary: Automated documentation engine that transforms raw source artifacts into a synchronized, living knowledge base by extracting business logic and functional capabilities, thereby reducing documentation debt, standardizing terminology, and accelerating cross-team onboarding through domain-focused analysis.
finding: The system employs a deterministic four-stage analysis pipeline to translate technical implementations into domain-centric concepts, generating structured wiki sections alongside cross-cutting derivatives such as user personas, behavioral stories, and interaction diagrams. It ensures quality and transparency through explicit gap declarations to prevent speculative content, dual-mode output support (schema-validated structure and free-form narrative), and timestamped provenance for full traceability from documentation back to source artifacts.
